pull_request.title: SDKS-2986: Remove android-cpp quickstart app
pull_request.body:
Closes SDKS-2986

## Summary

- Remove `android-cpp/` directory and all app source code
- Delete `.github/workflows/android-cpp-ci.yml` CI workflow
- Remove `android-cpp` entries from BrowserStack device config, CODEOWNERS, bump-versions.js, and BrowserStack name generator action
- Remove cross-references from root README.md and cpp-tui/README.md

## Context

Ditto is dropping C++ SDK support for Android. This PR removes the android-cpp quickstart app and all references to it.

## Test plan

- [x] Verify no remaining references: `grep -r "android.cpp\|android_cpp\|Android C++" . --include="*.yml" --include="*.js" --include="*.md"`
- [x] Verify `node scripts/bump-versions.js --help` still works
- [x] Verify other CI workflows are unmodified

-# Appium E2E Tests for Android CPP Tasks App
-
-End-to-end Appium tests that verify dynamically seeded tasks appear in the Android CPP Tasks app.
-
-## Local Testing
-
-### Prerequisites
-```bash
-npm install -g appium
-appium --port 4723
-export DITTO_CLOUD_TASK_TITLE="Your Task Name"
-```
-
-### Run Test
-```bash
-../gradlew test
-```
-
-## BrowserStack Testing
-
-### Environment Variables
-```bash
-export BROWSERSTACK_USERNAME="your-username"
-export BROWSERSTACK_ACCESS_KEY="your-access-key"
-export BROWSERSTACK_APP_URL="bs://your-app-id"
-export DITTO_CLOUD_TASK_TITLE="Task Name to Find"
-```
-
-### Run Test
-```bash
-../gradlew test
-```
-
-## CI/CD Integration
-
-The test integrates with `.github/workflows/android-cpp-ci.yml`:
-1. Seeds dynamic task document to Ditto Cloud
-2. Uploads APK to BrowserStack
-3. Runs Appium test to verify seeded task appears
-4. Reports pass/fail status
-
-## Test Details
-
-- **Device**: Google Pixel 7 (Android 13.0) on BrowserStack
-- **Framework**: Appium + TestNG + Kotlin
-- **Verification**: Searches for task by exact and partial text match
-- **Features**: Permission handling, BrowserStack status reporting
